incident.message: Not targeting the latest versions of Android; compatibility modes apply. Consider testing and updating this version. Consult the `android.os.Build.VERSION_CODES` javadoc for details.
A newer version of Gradle than 8.13 is available: 8.14.4
A newer version of `compileSdkVersion` than 34 is available: 36
A newer version of androidx.security:security-crypto than 1.1.0-alpha06 is available: 1.1.0
A newer version of androidx.compose:compose-bom than 2024.02.00 is available: 2026.03.00
A newer version of androidx.activity:activity-compose than 1.8.2 is available: 1.13.0
A newer version of androidx.navigation:navigation-compose than 2.7.7 is available: 2.9.7
A newer version of androidx.hilt:hilt-navigation-compose than 1.2.0 is available: 1.3.0
A newer version of androidx.hilt:hilt-work than 1.2.0 is available: 1.3.0
A newer version of androidx.hilt:hilt-compiler than 1.2.0 is available: 1.3.0
A newer version of androidx.room:room-runtime than 2.6.1 is available: 2.8.4
A newer version of androidx.room:room-ktx than 2.6.1 is available: 2.8.4
A newer version of androidx.room:room-compiler than 2.6.1 is available: 2.8.4
A newer version of androidx.sqlite:sqlite-ktx than 2.4.0 is available: 2.6.2
A newer version of androidx.work:work-runtime-ktx than 2.9.0 is available: 2.11.1
A newer version of androidx.lifecycle:lifecycle-viewmodel-compose than 2.7.0 is available: 2.10.0
A newer version of androidx.lifecycle:lifecycle-runtime-ktx than 2.7.0 is available: 2.10.0
A newer version of androidx.lifecycle:lifecycle-runtime-compose than 2.7.0 is available: 2.10.0
A newer version of androidx.datastore:datastore-preferences than 1.0.0 is available: 1.2.1
A newer version of androidx.camera:camera-camera2 than 1.3.1 is available: 1.5.3
A newer version of androidx.camera:camera-lifecycle than 1.3.1 is available: 1.5.3
A newer version of androidx.camera:camera-view than 1.3.1 is available: 1.5.3
A newer version of androidx.test.ext:junit than 1.1.5 is available: 1.3.0
A newer version of androidx.test.espresso:espresso-core than 3.5.1 is available: 3.7.0
A newer version of com.google.dagger:hilt-android than 2.51 is available: 2.59.2
A newer version of com.google.dagger:hilt-android-compiler than 2.51 is available: 2.59.2
A newer version of com.squareup.okhttp3:okhttp than 4.12.0 is available: 5.3.2
A newer version of com.squareup.okhttp3:logging-interceptor than 4.12.0 is available: 5.3.2
A newer version of com.squareup.retrofit2:retrofit than 2.9.0 is available: 3.0.0
A newer version of com.squareup.retrofit2:converter-gson than 2.9.0 is available: 3.0.0
A newer version of org.jetbrains.kotlinx:kotlinx-coroutines-android than 1.7.3 is available: 1.10.2
A newer version of org.jetbrains.kotlinx:kotlinx-coroutines-test than 1.7.3 is available: 1.10.2
A newer version of io.mockk:mockk than 1.13.9 is available: 1.14.9
The native library `arm64-v8a/libsqlcipher.so` (from `net.zetetic:android-database-sqlcipher:4.5.4`) is not 16 KB aligned

Fixed screen orientations will be ignored in most cases, starting from Android 16. Android is moving toward a model where apps are expected to adapt to various orientations, display sizes, and aspect ratios.
Unnecessary; `SDK_INT` is always >= 26
Unnecessary; `SDK_INT` is always >= 26
Unnecessary; `SDK_INT` is always >= 26
Unnecessary; `SDK_INT` is always >= 26
Unnecessary; `SDK_INT` is always >= 26
This folder configuration (`v26`) is unnecessary; `minSdkVersion` is 26. Merge all the resources in this folder into `mipmap-anydpi`.
Prefer `mutableLongStateOf` instead of `mutableStateOf`
Prefer `mutableLongStateOf` instead of `mutableStateOf`
Prefer `mutableIntStateOf` instead of `mutableStateOf`
The application adaptive icon is missing a monochrome tag
The application adaptive roundIcon is missing a monochrome tag
Use the KTX extension function `SharedPreferences.edit` instead?

fix-composite.description: Replace with the edit extension function
fix-composite.family: Replace with the edit extension function

incident.message: Use the KTX function `createBitmap` instead?
Use the KTX extension function `Bitmap.set` instead?

fix-replace.description: Replace with the set extension function
fix-replace.family: Replace with the set extension function
fix-replace.oldString: bmp.setPixel( x, y, if (bitMatrix[x, y]) android.graphics.Color.BLACK else android.graphics.Color.WHITE )
fix-replace.replacement: bmp[x, y] = if (bitMatrix[x, y]) android.graphics.Color.BLACK else android.graphics.Color.WHITE

incident.message: Use the KTX extension function `SharedPreferences.edit` instead?
